name: Tomatoes, Mozzarella and Basil (Fjvm15a)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut tomatoes in half and slice each half into 3 wedges.
2. Cut cheese into 1-inch cubes.
3. Mix basil with lemon juice and olive oil until combined.
4. Pour the mixture just enough over spinach to moisten it slightly.
5. Arrange spinach on chilled salad plates.
6. Toss the cheese and tomatoes with the remaining dressing.
7. Arrange the tossed ingredients over the spinach.
8. Sprinkle black pepper over the top.
